title: Project Metadata, Resources, PyInstaller, and Platform Builds · Program Brief: Resource Access
summary: A one-file artifact is copied across operating systems, Tcl/Tk data is assumed present, assets depend on the working directory, and only the build machine launches it. Predict the model, event, graph, solver, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the resource access increment in platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Load licensed package resources without assuming source checkout or current working directory layout.
Define package layout, metadata, Python requirement, dependencies, console or GUI entry point, and import-safe startup.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

A defensible solution applies Resource Access, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to platform-native signed-off release artifact matrix.

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-worked-maze-packaging-platforms-4
# Competency: maze-worked-maze-packaging-platforms-4.
# Case 1655: a classroom algorithm comparison.
# Operating constraint: native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution.
# Changed case: change display scale and retain focus and control access.
def worked_maze_packaging_platforms_4(target_platforms: int = 3, native_builds: int = 3, clean_launches: int = 3, missing_tk_assets: int = 0, artifact_digests: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "gridworked4",
        "topology1655",
        "search4dekrow",
        "eventworked41655",
        "access1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or native_builds < 0:
        return False, native_builds, "platform-matrix"
    if native_builds != target_platforms or clean_launches != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_launches, "clean-install-gap"
    if missing_tk_assets > 0:
        return False, missing_tk_assets, "tk-resource-gap"
    if artifact_digests != target_platforms:
        return False, artifact_digests, "artifact-identity"
    assert clean_launches == target_platforms
    return True, clean_launches, "platform-native-release"

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Load licensed package resources without assuming source checkout or current working directory layout.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Resource Access model · Theory Resource Access, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory puzzle team handles case 9688 during a museum kiosk accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile package metadata, resources, Tcl and Tk assets, native artifacts, and clean-install launches; native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Load licensed package resources without assuming source checkout or current working directory layout.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Resource Access model · Theory Resource Access, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: Relative paths beside the source file work unchanged in every bundle.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: maze-resource-access-1i6m8b(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_maze_resource_access_1i6m8b\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?target_platforms < 1 or native_builds < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?native_builds != target_platforms or clean_launches != target_platforms)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?missing_tk_assets > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?artifact_digests != target_platforms)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
